title: Salesforce AI & Agentic Engineer - 4+ Years
company_focus: IT services and technology consulting for enterprises
description:
Key Responsibilities

- Build and integrate Einstein, GPT, and Salesforce AI
  capabilities into business workflows.
- Design agentic capabilities such as autonomous workflows,
  reasoning chains, dynamic task execution and contextual
  assistance within Salesforce apps.
- Develop LWC, Apex, Flows, and platform events to deliver
  AI‑augmented user experiences.
- Implement Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) patterns and
  integrate external data sources for enhanced AI responses.
- Work with prompts, prompt templates, grounding strategies,
  embeddings, vector search, and knowledge augmentation.
- Implement, test, and refine AI copilots, AI assistants,
  service bots, and conversational experiences.
- Collaborate with architects to define AI governance, trust,
  safety, and responsible use guardrails.
- Build integrations with external AI platforms (OpenAI, Azure
  OpenAI, Anthropic, etc.) as required.

Optimize performance, accuracy, and reliability of AI
workflows and ensure alignment with business outcomes.

Responsibilities

Key Responsibilities

- Build and integrate Einstein, GPT, and Salesforce AI
  capabilities into business workflows.
- Design agentic capabilities such as autonomous workflows,
  reasoning chains, dynamic task execution and contextual
  assistance within Salesforce apps.
- Develop LWC, Apex, Flows, and platform events to deliver
  AI‑augmented user experiences.
- Implement Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) patterns and
  integrate external data sources for enhanced AI responses.
- Work with prompts, prompt templates, grounding strategies,
  embeddings, vector search, and knowledge augmentation.
- Implement, test, and refine AI copilots, AI assistants,
  service bots, and conversational experiences.
- Collaborate with architects to define AI governance, trust,
  safety, and responsible use guardrails.
- Build integrations with external AI platforms (OpenAI, Azure
  OpenAI, Anthropic, etc.) as required.

Optimize performance, accuracy, and reliability of AI
workflows and ensure alignment with business outcomes.

Qualifications

Required Skills

- 4–8 years of Salesforce development experience (Apex, LWC,
  Flows).
- Strong understanding of Salesforce AI features including
  Einstein, GPT, Copilot Studio, Prompt Builder, and Model
  Builder.
- Hands-on experience with LLMs, prompt engineering,
  embeddings, vector databases, or agentic frameworks.
- Experience integrating Salesforce with external APIs and AI
  platforms.
- Understanding of data modeling, security, and ethical
  considerations for AI-driven applications.
- Strong problem-solving abilities with an experimentation
  mindset.

Contextual AI assistance and reasoning chains for business users
RAG-enhanced AI responses grounded in enterprise knowledge and external data

ai_classification_reasoning:
This role involves directly building and deploying AI
capabilities including RAG patterns, agentic workflows,
prompt engineering, and integrating LLMs (Einstein, GPT,
Anthropic) into Salesforce applications. The engineer works
hands-on with models, agents, and AI workflows rather than
supporting others who build AI.
